emails.subject: Tradespark
emails.body: Tradespark Were you guys ever able to get into the site? Just checking on the status. thanks Sheri

emails.subject: Tradespark
emails.body: Tradespark Were you guys ever able to get into the site? Just checking on the status. thanks Sheri

emails.subject: Re: Tradespark
emails.body: Re: Tradespark Sheri I was only able to get to the public face pages. I have not attempted access in the last couple of days. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com Sheri Thomas@ECT 02/20/2001 10:02 AM

emails.subject: Re: Tradespark
emails.body: Any update? People are anxious to get on the system. We are working with them on some other initiatives, and would like to get this signed asap. Thanks Sheri Mark Greenberg@ENRON 02/20/2001 01:02 PM
